About Us

Family-Owned. Locally Run.
Locksmith Since 2010.

A St. Louis County locksmith built on a simple idea: fast, honest service should never be a luxury.

Call Now: (314) 532-1112Read Our Story

Trained Local Technicians

Licensed mobile locksmiths skilled with every major lock brand.

Our Story

Built On Trust, Run By Family

Nonstop Lock & Key was founded in 2010 with a simple idea: when someone in St. Louis is locked out of their home, car, or business, they deserve fast, honest help. No inflated prices, no long waits, no call center across the country.

Fully licensed and insured in Missouri, our family-owned mobile fleet serves 20 cities across St. Louis County. From historic homes in DeMun to commercial corridors along Manchester Road, every job gets professional-grade tools, up-to-date training, and a real commitment to doing things right the first time.

What started as a one-person operation has grown into a trusted name across the metro, backed by 100+ five-star reviews from real customers. We answer the phone 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, including holidays.

Call (314) 532-1112Read Our Reviews

Family-Owned Since 2010

Licensed, insured, and trusted by St. Louis County for over 16 years.

Lockouts, Rekeys, Key Fobs & More

Why Choose Us

What Sets Nonstop Apart

Plenty of locksmiths in St. Louis. Here's why our customers keep choosing us and referring their neighbors.

Upfront Pricing

No hidden fees, no surprises. Clear quote before any work begins.

Licensed & Insured

Fully licensed and insured in Missouri. Your property is protected.

24/7 Service

Locked out at 2 AM on a holiday? We answer. Always available.

Mobile Service

We come to you. Fully equipped vans carry everything for on-site work.

Local Technicians

Real local techs, not a call center. We know every St. Louis neighborhood.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

If you're not 100% satisfied, we make it right. No questions asked.

Brands We Service

We Work With Every Major Lock & Vehicle Brand

From residential deadbolts to commercial high-security systems and modern car keys, our technicians are trained on the brands you trust.

Residential & Deadbolts

SchlageKwiksetYaleBaldwinDefiantMaster Lock

Smart Locks

AugustSchlage EncodeYale AssureKwikset HaloRingGoogle Nest

Commercial & High-Security

MedecoMul-T-LockAbloySargentBestMarks USA

Automotive

FordChevroletHondaToyotaNissanHyundaiSubaruBMWMercedes-BenzAudiAcuraLexus

Don't see your brand? Call us — chances are we service it. Our technicians stay current on new models and smart lock releases.

Customer Reviews

Trusted By 100+ Local Customers

See Our Reviews on Google→

Tony D.

12 September 2025

Locked my keys in the car at the worst possible time — driving my daughter to her dance recital. Called Nonstop in a panic and they had a tech to us in 22 minutes flat. Got the door open without a scratch, and we made it with 10 minutes to spare. Cannot thank them enough.

L

Lisa B.

15 April 2024

Same-day rekey on our new house. Quick, fair, done right. Thanks Alex.

Rachel V.

8 March 2026

I'm not a customer who locks myself out often but when I did, Nonstop handled it like pros. They walked me through pricing on the phone, the tech showed up wearing a uniform (which honestly made me feel safer late at night), opened the door with no damage, and even waited until I confirmed I had my house keys before leaving. Total class act.

M

Mark P.

22 August 2024

Installed a Schlage Encode on our front door and walked us through every option in the app. Patient with our questions. Recommend.

Carmen S.

15 February 2026

My only Honda Accord key got destroyed by my dog. I had to choose between a $450 dealer quote or finding a locksmith. Nonstop programmed a fresh transponder right in my driveway for less than half. The tech also showed me how to put my car into safety mode in case it ever happens again. Way above and beyond.

J

Jeff M.

19 April 2026

Run a small business and we had a tenant lockout situation at 5am ahead of a 6am breakfast delivery. Nonstop dispatched someone immediately and got the suite open before we lost the order. These guys really do answer 24/7. Saved my morning.

Hannah K.

30 November 2025

House key snapped clean off in the deadbolt with my toddler napping inside. Panic doesn't begin to describe it. Called Nonstop and the tech was so calm and reassuring on the phone, walked me through what to expect. Got there fast, extracted the broken piece carefully, lock still works perfectly. We didn't even wake the baby.

Dave R.

8 December 2024

Wanted to upgrade all our exterior locks to a higher security grade after a break-in on our street. Nonstop walked me through the Grade 1 options without pushing the most expensive, installed five new deadbolts and reinforced the strike plates. Doors look better than before, and we feel a lot safer.

Ready To Join Our Happy Customers?

FAQ

About Nonstop Lock & Key

Nonstop Lock & Key has served the St. Louis area since 2010. Our family-owned mobile locksmith team brings over 16 years of combined experience to every job, from emergency lockouts to high-security installations.
100%GUARANTEE

Our Promise

Honest Service Every Time. Transparent Pricing, No Hidden Fees.
